mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM suppliers
AND (name LIKE '%' + #{search} + '%' OR contact_name LIKE '%' + #{search} + '%' OR phone LIKE '%' + #{search} + '%') AND is_active = #{isActive}
SELECT supplier_id, name AS supplier_name, contact_name, phone, email, address, payment_terms, lead_time_days, is_active FROM suppliers WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO suppliers (name, contact_name, phone, email, address, payment_terms, lead_time_days, is_active) VALUES (#{supplierName}, #{contactName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{paymentTerms}, #{leadTimeDays}, ISNULL(#{isActive}, 1))
mapper.update: UPDATE suppliers SET name = #{supplierName}, contact_name = #{contactName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, payment_terms = #{paymentTerms}, lead_time_days = #{leadTimeDays}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId}
